heading: Hybrid Search Retriever
body:
`MongoDBAtlasHybridSearchRetriever` is a retriever
that combines vector search and full-text search results by using the
Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) algorithm. To learn more, see [How to Perform Hybrid Search](as_hybrid-search).

This retriever requires an existing [vector store](langchain-vector-store), [index definition](avs-types-vector-search),
and [create a MongoDB Search index](ref-create-index).
